name: orbit-card-stack
title: Orbit Card Stack
author: Parable
description: A draggable card deck (testimonials, photos, prompts): the top card can be flung left or right to spring it off-screen and orbit to the back, while prev/next buttons and the arrow keys advance and rewind through a depth-stacked pile. Exposes real carousel semantics with a polite live region and one exposed slide at a time; under prefers-reduced-motion it reorders instantly with no drag or throw physics.
